infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aike uses your location to set pickup/drop-off and show nearby riders.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Riders share location only while online or on an active delivery so senders can track the trip.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Riders share location only while online or on an active delivery.

extra.//: Non-secret runtime config is read from env at build time; see src/config.ts and .env.example. No secrets here.
